description: Taiwan OSAT specializing in driver IC and non-driver IC packaging/testing. Services: gold/solder/copper bumping, RDL, wafer probe testing, die processing (wafer grinding/thinning, dicing, tape-and-reel), chip-on-film (COF), chip-on-glass (COG), WLCSP. Also handles compound semiconductors (SiGe, GaAs, GaN, SiC). Market cap ~47B TWD.

majorSuppliers: ACCRETECH/Tokyo Seimitsu (CMP-0001) - wafer probing and dicing equipment
_externalRelationships.notes: Hsinchu-based. Six factories in Taiwan plus one in Malaysia. Wafer dicing and wafer probe testing are core services, making Chipbond a buyer of both Accretech dicers and probers.
